description: Check the latest release version and changelog for any EDOT or OTel component. Use when the user asks about current versions, recent changes, or compatibility.

configuration.query: FROM edot-kb-github | WHERE content_type == "release" AND repo LIKE ?repo_pattern | KEEP title, body, url, repo, last_modified, version, release_tag | SORT last_modified DESC | LIMIT 3

repo_pattern.description: Pattern to match the repository name (e.g., '%elastic-otel-python%' for the EDOT Python SDK, '%opentelemetry-collector%' for the OTel Collector)
